$schema-note: Policy for scripts/check-licenses.mjs (#462). `allowed` lists SPDX identifiers permitted anywhere in the shipped closure; a package passes if its license expression is satisfiable using only allowed ids (OR = any branch, AND = every operand). `exceptions` are individually reviewed packages whose license is otherwise disallowed or undeclared — each needs a reason. Keep both lists tight; they only ever shrink or gain justified entries.

@overlook/touch-id.reason: First-party native Touch ID bridge (@overlook scope, published without an SPDX field). Covered by this project's MIT LICENSE; not third-party.

@img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64.reason: libvips prebuilt shared library, loaded dynamically by sharp as a separate .node/.dylib. LGPL permits distribution inside an MIT app provided its license text ships (THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md) and the library can be relinked — satisfied because it ships as a replaceable standalone binary, not statically linked.
